zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Saint Lowe於1499年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓時，他的父親Nicholas Saint Lowe37歲，母親Eleanor Sydenham Arundell Fitzalan36歲。他於1518年之前與Margaret Kingston在英國英格蘭素瑞金斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1559年3月20日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Saint Lowe于1499年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓时，他的父亲Nicholas Saint Lowe37岁，母亲Eleanor Sydenham Arundell Fitzalan36岁。他于1518年之前与Margaret Kingston在英国英格兰素瑞金斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1559年3月20日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Saint
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: Lowe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Low  .

German (Löwe) and Danish (Løwe): from Middle High German lēwe, löuwe ‘lion’, hence a nickname for a brave or regal person. In some cases the surname may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn distinguished by the sign of a lion. It is also found in Sweden. Compare Loewe 1, Lau , Lave , and Lurvey .
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Löwe): artificial name from German Löwe ‘lion’.

variants.name: Lau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wai, Wing, Kam, Kwok, Ming, Chi, Yuk, Chun, Kin, Ching, Kwan, Man.

German: nickname for a physically strong person, from Middle High German louwe, lauwe ‘lion’. In some cases the surname may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn distinguished by the sign of a lion. Compare Lowe .
German: topographic name for someone living in a bush-covered area or clearing, Middle Low German lo, loch, lage, Middle High German lō.

variants.name: Loew
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Eckhard, Fritz, Hans, Heinz, Hermann, Manfred, Raimund.
German (mainly Löw): variant of Löwe ‘lion’ (see Lowe 2). The surname Loew is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Low 5.

variants.name: Lobe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Erwin, Horst, Otto, Winfried.
German (Löbe): variant of Löwe ‘lion’ (see Lowe 2).
German: metonymic occupational name for a tanner, from Middle High German lō ‘tanning bark’.

variants.name: Loewe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Armin, Gerhard, Helmuth, Klaus, Kurt.
German (mainly Löwe): see Lowe 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Löwe): artificial name from German Löwe ‘lion’. Compare Lowe 3.

variants.name: Loewen
meanings: German (Löwen): variant of Löwe ‘lion’ (see Lowe 2). Compare Lowen 2.

variants.name: Low
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tumulus, mound or hill, Middle English lowe, from Old English hlāw (see Law 2).

Scottish and English: nickname for a short man, from Middle English lah, lowe (Old Norse lágr; the word was adopted first into the northern dialects of Middle English, where Scandinavian influence was strong, and then spread south, with regular alteration of the vowel quality).

English and Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname for a violent or dangerous person, from Anglo-Norman French lou, leu ‘wolf’ (from Latin lupus). Wolves were relatively common in Britain at the time when most surnames were formed, as there still existed large tracts of uncleared forest.

variants.name: Lurvey
meanings: Americanized form of German Löwe ‘lion’ (see Lowe 2).
History: Peter Lurvy, the immigrant ancestor of this family, was in Ipswich, MA, by 1679.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Saint Lowe was born in 1499, in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Saint Lowe, was 37 and his mother, Eleanor Sydenham Arundell Fitzalan, was 36. He married Margaret Kingston before 1518, in Kingston, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 March 1559, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Saint Lowe est né en 1499, à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Saint Lowe, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Sydenham Arundell Fitzalan, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Kingston avant 1518, à Kingston, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1559, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Saint Lowe 1499 in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Saint Lowe 37 und seine Mutter Eleanor Sydenham Arundell Fitzalan 36. Er hat vor 1518 in Kingston, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Margaret Kingston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. März 1559 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gloucestershire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Saint Loweが1499年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Saint Loweは37歳，母Eleanor Sydenham Arundell Fitzalanは36歳であった。1518年以前にイギリスイギリススリーキングストンでMargaret Kingstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1559年3月20日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで60歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Saint Lowe(이)가 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Saint Lowe(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Sydenham Arundell Fitzalan(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1518년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수리 킨그스턴에서 Margaret Kingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 3월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Saint Lowe родился в 1499 г. в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Saint Lowe было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Sydenham Arundell Fitzalan, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Kingston перед 1518 г. в местности кингстон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 марта 1559 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Kingston antes de 1518, en Kingston, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1559, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
